channel.title: Argyrios Samourkasidis
channel.description: This is Argyrios (Argyris) Samourkasidis personal website. Argyris is currently pursuing his PhD. He is a researcher and has worked for a FP7 European project (MODEXTREME). He is affiliated with Democritus University of Thrace (DUTH) and Wageningen University in the Netherlands. He is a travel and computer enthousiast, contributing in Python projects in his free time.
